en_title: ESRB Leaks Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine - Master Crafted Edition for PS5 and Nintendo Switch 2
cn_title: ESRB泄露《战锤40K：星际战士》大师工艺版将登陆PS5和任天堂Switch 2
subtitle: 战锤老兵再出征
opus_summary: ESRB评级页面短暂显示《战锤40K：星际战士》大师工艺版将登陆PS5和任天堂Switch 2。本作去年已登陆PC、XBOX Series和XBOX Game Pass，但上线时因价格和改动受到玩家批评。

paragraphs.en: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine - Master Crafted Edition looks set for PlayStation 5 and Nintendo Switch 2, having launched on PC, Xbox Series X and S, and straight into Xbox Game Pass in June last year.
paragraphs.cn: 《战锤40K：星际战士》大师工艺版看起来将登陆PlayStation 5和任天堂Switch 2。本作去年6月已经登陆PC、XBOX Series，并首日加入XBOX Game Pass。

paragraphs.en: The ESRB’s listing for the game included PS5 and Switch 2 alongside PC, although word of the two consoles has now been removed.
paragraphs.cn: ESRB的游戏列表曾把PS5和Switch 2与PC一同列出，不过关于这两台主机的信息现在已经被移除。

paragraphs.en: Sega, which retains the rights to the Relic Entertainment-developed original third-person shooter, is behind the release. The original was published by THQ in 2011 for PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, and PC. The Master Crafted Edition was developed by SneakyBox, and has a 4K resolution, modernized controls, an interface overhaul, improved character models, and remastered audio, which includes over 100 new voice lines for the Orks.
paragraphs.cn: 这次发行由世嘉负责。世嘉保留着这款由Relic Entertainment开发的原版第三人称射击游戏权利。原作由THQ于2011年发行，登陆PlayStation 3、XBOX 360和PC。大师工艺版由SneakyBox开发，支持4K分辨率、现代化控制、界面翻新、改进后的角色模型，以及重制音频，其中包括兽人超过100句新语音。

paragraphs.en: However, the Master Crafted Edition was criticized by fans last summer , with Steam players in particular expressing their dissatisfaction. Complaints revolved around the high price of the game relative to the changes it makes over the well-received Anniversary Edition, and, on those changes, bemusement in response to what many considered worse usability. This, coupled with struggles to find others to play with online, caused some to call Space Marine - Master Crafted Edition a "cash grab."
paragraphs.cn: 不过，大师工艺版去年夏天曾受到粉丝批评，Steam玩家尤其表达了不满。抱怨主要集中在游戏相对于广受好评的周年版所做改动而言价格过高；至于这些改动本身，许多人认为可用性反而更差，因此感到困惑。再加上线上很难找到其他玩家一起游玩，一些人称《星际战士》大师工艺版是在「圈钱」。

paragraphs.en: The backlash resulted in Sega offering an extended refund policy on Steam, a 50% upgrade path discount for Anniversary Edition owners, and a patch roadmap. Steam user reviews at launch were 'Mostly Negative.' Now, a year later, they have improved to 'Mixed.'
paragraphs.cn: 这些反弹导致世嘉在Steam上提供了延长退款政策，为周年版拥有者提供50%的升级路径折扣，并公布了补丁路线图。游戏发售时的Steam用户评价为「多半差评」。一年后的现在，它已经提升至「褒贬不一」。

paragraphs.en: Updates dried up in September last year, so hopefully the game’s arrival on new platforms comes with a significant patch. Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine eventually got its sequel, the smash hit that was 2024's Space Marine 2. It's done so well that Space Marine 3 is on the way.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏更新在去年9月后就逐渐停了下来，所以希望它登陆新平台时会伴随一个重要补丁。《战锤40K：星际战士》最终迎来了续作，也就是2024年的热门作品《星际战士2》。它表现如此出色，以至于《星际战士3》也已经在路上。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
